title: I, You, and We: A Manifesto for Human–AI Co-Creation in Shiftopia
description: A bilingual Persian–English manifesto defining the roles, limits, disclosure duties, and accountability principles of human–AI co-creation. The work separates evidence from interpretation and narrative and frames Shiftopia as an open cultural and technical inquiry into memory, identity, provenance, and responsibility.
notes: Bilingual publication in English and Persian. Le Chat (Mistral AI) assisted with analysis, organization, drafting, and language refinement; Amir Ahmadi made the final editorial decisions and accepts responsibility for the content.
